task_description: Visual refinement of DMS Cockpit dashboard from v0.2 to v0.3. Upgrade CenterVideoPanel with a rich realistic cabin SVG scene, enhance RightHeadPanel 3D wireframe, improve LeftConsole section headers and spacing, and refine BottomTimeline charts. All changes are visual-only - no architecture/telemetry changes.

verification.summary: Build/tests skipped (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, no node_modules). Validated via: balanced delimiter checks on all 4 TSX files (PASS), import validation (only react, recharts, lucide-react, relative imports), SVG id prefix verification (22 cvp- ids, 3 rhp- ids), unused CSS removal confirmed, scanline animate removal confirmed. 5 files modified, 544 insertions, 223 deletions. Semantic review v1 issues all addressed.
